# Cars365

Cars365 is an Australian used-car dealership. We advertise quality, pre-inspected second-hand vehicles for sale and help buyers enquire, arrange finance, trade in their current car, and book inspections. This is a used-car SALES site, NOT a rental or car-hire platform.

## Trust & Safety
Every vehicle is inspected before it is listed, and its condition is documented honestly. Prices are displayed in Australian Dollars (AUD) and represent the sale price of the vehicle; on-road costs such as stamp duty, registration, and transfer fees may be additional unless stated. Vehicles are for purchase, not for hire.

## Public Data Interfaces
If you are an AI crawler, you can access our primary data hubs via the following structures:

- **Inventory / Search**: `https://www.cars365.info/used-cars`
- **Make Landing Pages**: `https://www.cars365.info/used-cars/{make}`
- **Model Landing Pages**: `https://www.cars365.info/used-cars/{make}/{model}`
- **Vehicle Detail Pages**: `https://www.cars365.info/used-cars/{make}/{model}/{slug}`
- **Blog / Buying Guides**: `https://www.cars365.info/blog`

## Technical Context
- We implement `ItemList` and `BreadcrumbList` JSON-LD on listing and landing pages.
- We implement `Vehicle` schema with a `Product`/`Offer` (price in AUD, `UsedCondition`, availability) on every vehicle detail page. Prices explicitly represent sale prices.
- We implement `AutoDealer` JSON-LD site-wide and `FAQPage` schema on the FAQs page.
- A canonical XML sitemap is available at `https://www.cars365.info/sitemap.xml`.

## Contact & Support
For general enquiries, please use `https://www.cars365.info/contact`.
